messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] R Programming
messages.body_plain:
Good day! Do you still have the package for R(D)COM Interface? I tried this
site,http://cran.r-project.org/contrib/extra/dcom/RSrv135.exe,
unfortunately it is not available. I hope you can send me a copy for this
package! It would be a great help for my research!

Thank You!
-Gerald Reymari A. Cagayan (University of the Philippines Los Banos)

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

Message: 1

To: r-sig-insurance at r-project.org
Subject: [R-sig-ins] R Programming

        <CAAXqAM1=409+Tkwhypbs05F53b=NEYvCXBpeL06zkfcyVBQzPg at mail.gmail.com>
Content-Type: text/plain; charset="UTF-8"

Good day! Do you still have the package for R(D)COM Interface? I tried this site,http://cran.r-project.org/contrib/extra/dcom/RSrv135.exe,
unfortunately it is not available. I hope you can send me a copy for this package! It would be a great help for my research!

Thank You!
-Gerald Reymari A. Cagayan (University of the Philippines Los Banos)
